title: AI Data Centers — Yahoo stock scraper input

tickers.title: Tickers
tickers.description: Yahoo Finance symbols to fetch (home-exchange form), e.g. 2330.TW, 005930.KS, 8035.T, ASML.AS, 0981.HK

proxyGroup.title: Proxy group
proxyGroup.description: RESIDENTIAL is reliable against Yahoo's datacenter-IP block (~$8/GB, pennies at this volume). DATACENTER is free but Yahoo may block it.
